title: PhD
biography: Robert Furchgott was an American pharmacologist who discovered that nitric oxide (NO) is a signaling molecule in the cardiovascular system. Nobel Prize 1998.
aiSummary: Robert Furchgott is a pharmacology specialist at SUNY Downstate Medical Center. Based in New York.

timeline.title: Discovered EDRF/nitric oxide
timeline.description: Found that blood vessels relax through an endothelium-derived factor, later identified as nitric oxide

timeline.title: Nobel Prize
timeline.description: For discoveries concerning nitric oxide as a signalling molecule in the cardiovascular system
